note: Mirrors the `questions` array in trivia-night.html. Keep both in sync when editing.

questions.notes: Warm-up question — used to explain the rules and question-distribution criteria.

questions.text: What is Bandit Heeler's middle name?
Who's most likely sending this exchange in the family chat?
Which player did not play in the 2000 Subway Series?
questions.notes: Mussina was on the Baltimore Orioles in 2000; he signed with the Yankees in December 2000 and pitched in the 2001 World Series.

questions.text: DeMarini, Easton, Kraken, Lizard Skins — these are all companies that sell what?
questions.notes: DeMarini and Easton make bats; Kraken sells bats; Lizard Skins is best known for bat grip tape — accept 'softball bats', 'bats', or 'softball equipment'.

questions.text: How many cousins are older than Sophia?
questions.notes: Hidden behind a Start button; the 10s timer begins when the host reveals the question.

questions.text: Jalousie, Casement, Awning, Double-hung — these are all a type of what?
What profession uses classifiers and role shifting?
questions.notes: Classifiers and role shifting are ASL grammatical/storytelling techniques — accept 'sign language interpreter', 'ASL interpreter', or 'signer'.
